identity: Human female ranger, auburn hair in a long side-braid falling over the shoulder, sharp green eyes, light tan freckled skin, wiry athletic build.
outfit: Forest-green hooded cloak (hood DOWN, resting on shoulders), brown leather vest over a cream tunic, leather pauldrons, fingerless archery gloves. Brown trousers, soft leather boots. Quiver of arrows on the back.
weapons: A curved wooden longbow held in the left hand, arrow nocked but not drawn.
attackStyle: East-facing. Longbow drawn to the cheek, arrow nocked and pulled back, left arm extended forward, right hand at the chin. Braid streaming back.
spellStyle: East-facing. Longbow held low, right hand raised with a single glowing green leaf hovering above the open palm.
blockStyle: East-facing. Longbow held diagonally across the body as a guard, left arm angled to deflect. Chin down, stance braced.
koStyle: East-facing, collapsed on one knee, longbow dropped beside her. Head down, braid fallen forward.
southStyle: Facing camera (south), relaxed idle. Longbow in left hand at her side, right hand on the arrow at her hip. Calm alert expression.
portraitStyle: Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Auburn braid over shoulder, green eyes, leather vest and quiver strap visible.

referenceSheet.prompt:
IDENTITY (this image becomes the canonical identity anchor — preserve in every downstream frame): Human female ranger, auburn hair in a long side-braid falling over the shoulder, sharp green eyes, light tan freckled skin, wiry athletic build.

OUTFIT: Forest-green hooded cloak (hood DOWN, resting on shoulders), brown leather vest over a cream tunic, leather pauldrons, fingerless archery gloves. Brown trousers, soft leather boots. Quiver of arrows on the back.

WEAPONS: A curved wooden longbow held in the left hand, arrow nocked but not drawn.

CLASS: humanoid. Full-body view, head to feet visible. Character occupies ~70% of the canvas height. Feet aligned near the bottom; headroom above.

POSE: full-body side profile facing right (east), calm combat-ready idle. Head up, eyes visible. NOT a portrait bust, NOT a close-up — entire character from head to feet.

STYLE: detailed pixel art with clean readable silhouette, warm pixel-art palette, transparent background, no ground shadow.

portrait.prompt:
IDENTITY (must match reference sheet exactly): Human female ranger, auburn hair in a long side-braid falling over the shoulder, sharp green eyes, light tan freckled skin, wiry athletic build.

OUTFIT: Forest-green hooded cloak (hood DOWN, resting on shoulders), brown leather vest over a cream tunic, leather pauldrons, fingerless archery gloves. Brown trousers, soft leather boots. Quiver of arrows on the back.

WEAPONS: A curved wooden longbow held in the left hand, arrow nocked but not drawn.

POSE (portrait): Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Auburn braid over shoulder, green eyes, leather vest and quiver strap visible.

FRAMING: bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view, centered in a 256x256 canvas, shoulders fill the lower third.

SCALE (non-negotiable): character must occupy approximately 180px of the 256px canvas height — roughly 70%. Do NOT stretch or upscale. Extra space above head and/or below feet is correct.

STYLE: pixel art, transparent background, no ground shadow, no borders, no text. Match the palette and style of the reference sheet.

NEGATIVE: do not add weapons or props not listed in WEAPONS. Do not change palette, species, or outfit from the reference sheet. Do not zoom in — respect SCALE.
